justification: The issue describes a problem with the type of input to a scalar function when using `np.vectorize` to convert an array of `np.datetime64` to an array of `datetime.datetime`. This is inconsistent with expectations and could be considered a bug.
current_state_summary: The issue is open, labeled as a bug, and related to type handling during array conversion using `np.vectorize`. It has not been validated against the latest main branch.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
